nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: PHP-specific coding-style rules layered on the common coding-style baseline, covering PSR/standards adherence, immutability, formatting, import ordering, and error handling for PHP and composer.json files.
nodes.languageNotes: Rule file scoped via YAML frontmatter path globs (**/*.php, **/composer.json) and explicitly extends common/coding-style.md.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: PHP-specific hook guidance extending the common hooks rules, defining PostToolUse automation expectations (e.g. static analysis via PHPStan/Psalm) and warnings about hook usage.
nodes.languageNotes: Frontmatter targets PHP toolchain configs (phpstan.neon, psalm.xml) in addition to *.php and composer.json.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: PHP design-pattern rules extending the common patterns baseline, prescribing thin controllers with explicit services, DTOs/value objects, dependency injection, and clear architectural boundaries.
nodes.languageNotes: Emphasizes Laravel-flavored service/controller separation; scoped to *.php and composer.json.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: PHP-specific security rules extending the common security baseline, covering input/output sanitization, database safety (SQL injection avoidance), secret and dependency management, and auth/session safety.
nodes.languageNotes: Frontmatter also matches composer.lock for dependency-vulnerability scope.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: PHP-specific testing rules extending the common testing baseline, specifying the test framework (PHPUnit), coverage expectations, test organization, and Inertia-related testing guidance.
nodes.languageNotes: Frontmatter targets phpunit.xml / phpunit.xml.dist; Inertia section signals a Laravel + Inertia.js stack.
